name: email-agent
description: Email Agent - AI-powered email processing. Read, summarize, draft, and send emails. Uses MCP server for direct IMAP/SMTP access.

interface.shortDescription: Read, summarize, draft, and send emails via AI
interface.longDescription: Email Agent lets Codex read your inbox, generate daily summaries, draft replies, and send emails. Supports QQ Mail, 163, and Gmail.
